Remove your R500 float BEFORE counting
Take out the R500 float cash first and set it aside. Only count what will go to the bank. Do not include the float in your count below.

🚬 Roll joints from flower
How it works: Select a flower product → declare grams used → count actual joints rolled → select which preroll product to add them to. 1g = 1 preroll by default.
Rolling calculation
Count every joint you rolled — may differ from calculation due to wastage

Send now
📢 Send Broadcast
💡 On Android/iOS: tap "Send via WhatsApp" and a "📸 Share image" button will appear — this opens your phone's share sheet so you can send the image + text together to each member.
How to use in WhatsApp Business:
1. Open your phone contacts app and import the downloaded VCF file
2. All members will appear as contacts prefixed with "JJ |"
3. Open WhatsApp Business → tap ⋮ menu → New broadcast
4. Search "JJ |" to quickly select all member contacts
5. Add them all → type your message → send once → everyone gets it privately
Only opted-in members with valid phone numbers are included.
